summary: Cryptocurrency trading analysis and monitoring application with AI-powered recommendations, market radar, and manual trade monitoring
architectural_notes: Trade monitoring implemented frontend-only due to Binance API blocking ICP backend nodes
Manual trade entry system bypasses need for Binance API keys while providing risk management guidance
known_issues: Deployment errors occurred repeatedly in versions 47-50 due to Internet Computer infrastructure instability, resolved in final v50 deployment
Backend cannot make HTTP calls to Binance API - all market data and trade monitoring must be frontend-only

existing_features.title: Create a new Trade Monitoring view accessible from the main navigation tabs that allows users to manually input trade details including: asset symbol (e.g., BTCUSDT), leverage used (1x-125x), position direction (Long or Short), and entry price point.

After user submits trade details, display real-time monitoring panel showing current price, unrealized PnL percentage based on entry point and direction, and liquidation price calculated using the specified leverage.

Generate and display suggested price targets based on current market data and technical analysis: show 3 take-profit zones (TP1 at 1-2% from entry, TP2 at 3-5%, TP3 at 5-10%) adjusted for position direction, with percentage gains calculated for each zone.

Calculate and display recommended stop-loss price based on risk management principles: suggest stop-loss at 1-2% below entry for Long positions (above for Short), with adjustments based on asset volatility and support/resistance levels from technical analysis.

Allow users to save and track multiple monitored trades simultaneously with persistent storage, showing a list of active positions with quick summary cards displaying symbol, direction, entry, current PnL, and time elapsed since entry.

Integrate the Trade Monitoring feature with existing market data hooks (useQueries) to fetch real-time price updates from Binance Futures API directly in the frontend, maintaining consistency with the established frontend-only data fetching pattern.

new_feature_requests.summary: Manual trade monitoring: user inputs asset, leverage, direction (long/short), entry point; app suggests price targets, take-profit zones, and recommended stop-loss
